title: Simple Storage Network
description: A simplified port of the original Storage Network
body:
Connect all your chests into a network and access all your items at once




This mod was originally created by MrRiegel and others in Minecraft 1.10 [https://i.imgur.com/ZDk6Y9A.png](https://i.imgur.com/ZDk6Y9A.png).




See curseforge page for more details [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-storage-network](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-storage-network)
